headline: New Ownership of PostalAnnex in Portland, Oregon Brings Fresh Energy to the Business--Serving the Community with Shipping and Office Services for Over 30 Years
summary: Annex Brands, Inc., a leading franchisor in the packing, shipping, and office services industries, is pleased to announce the successful transfer of ownership of an existing PostalAnnex location in Portland, OR to new owners, Rajesh and Radnee Kadam. This transition to new ownership ensures that the community will benefit from the essential shipping and office services provided by this PostalAnnex for more than 30 years.
